description:
Bookmark manager and launcher.

Features

  • Organize bookmarks into multiple lists
  • Open saved bookmarks in the system browser
  • Receive shared links from other apps
  • Pick the destination list before saving a shared link

How it works

  • Nori helps you save interesting links from any app and organize them into lists.
  • When you're ready to read, Nori opens the link in your system browser for the best experience.
